brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of BLS Employment Projections data. Reads 832 rows from bronze.bls_ooh, validates SOC code format (XX-XXXX), derives SOC major group code and name from 22-group lookup, flags 7 hardcoded broad occupation codes, flags 70 catchall categories via case-insensitive 'all other' substring match on occupation_title, buckets employment_change_pct into growth_category, derives wage_available boolean, derives education_level_name from education_code lookup, renames load_date to source_load_date, computes deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id with 'ooh' prefix, drops source_url and source_method raw metadata, and promotes to base.bls_ooh via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Transform raw BLS Employment Projections data from Bronze into clean, modeled Silver base table. Validates SOC code format, derives SOC major group code and human-readable name from 22-group lookup, flags 7 broad occupation codes (hardcoded from Bronze SOC audit), flags 70 catchall 'all other' categories, buckets employment_change_pct into growth_category (6 tiers from declining_fast to booming), derives wage_available convenience flag, derives education_level_name from 8-value code lookup, renames load_date to source_load_date, computes deterministic record_id via grain hash on soc_code with 'ooh' prefix, drops raw metadata fields (source_url, source_method), and promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(record, ['soc_code'], prefix='ooh'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'ooh' prefix. Uses the already-transformed record dict, so the hash is based on the cleaned soc_code value.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Stripped whitespace, then validated against XX-XXXX regex pattern. ValueError raised on format violation. No value mutation beyond strip().

occupation_title.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. None coerced to empty string as defensive fallback.

soc_major_group.transformationDescription: First 2 characters of soc_code extracted via soc_code[:2]. Yields the 2-digit SOC major group code (e.g., '15' from '15-1252'). ValueError raised if the resulting code is not in the 22-group lookup.

soc_major_group_name.transformationDescription: Derived from soc_major_group (first 2 chars of soc_code) via SOC_MAJOR_GROUP_LOOKUP dictionary. Maps 2-digit code to human-readable name (e.g., '15' -> 'Computer and Mathematical'). ValueError raised if code not found in the 22-entry lookup.

broad_occupation_flag.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if soc_code is in the hardcoded BROAD_OCCUPATION_CODES frozenset of 7 rolled-up/broad SOC codes identified in the Bronze SOC audit (13-1020, 13-2020, 29-2010, 31-1120, 39-7010, 47-4090, 51-2090). Pattern matching deliberately avoided per spec rationale.

catchall_flag.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if occupation_title.lower() contains the substring 'all other'. Identifies 70 residual BLS categories that aggregate unclassified occupations within a minor group.

employment_current.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Already converted from thousands to actual count during Bronze ingestion. No Silver transformation applied.

employment_projected.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Already converted from thousands to actual count during Bronze ingestion. No Silver transformation applied.

employment_change.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Can be negative for declining occupations (232 rows). Already converted from thousands during Bronze ingestion.

employment_change_pct.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Percent change in employment over 2024-2034 projection cycle. Can be negative. Used as input to growth_category derivation.

openings_annual_avg.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Average annual job openings as actual count. Already converted from thousands during Bronze ingestion.

growth_category.transformationDescription: Bucketed from employment_change_pct via derive_growth_category() using half-open intervals: <-10 -> 'declining_fast', [-10,-1) -> 'declining', [-1,1) -> 'stable', [1,10) -> 'growing', [10,20) -> 'growing_fast', >=20 -> 'booming', None -> None. Thresholds based on BLS convention where average 10-year growth is 3-5%.

median_annual_wage.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Null for 23 occupations (17 physicians/surgeons, 5 performers, 1 fishing/hunting). Preserved as-is; wage_available flag derived from nullity.

median_wage_capped.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Boolean flag for top-coded wages. Expected 0 True values in current interactive export data, but preserved to protect against future source changes. Defaults to False if missing in source row.

wage_available.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if median_annual_wage is not None. Convenience flag for downstream filtering. 809 True, 23 False expected.

education_typical.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Typical entry-level education label string. No transformation applied.

education_code.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. BLS education level code (1=Doctoral through 8=No formal). No transformation applied.

education_level_name.transformationDescription: Derived from education_code via EDUCATION_LEVEL_LOOKUP dictionary. Maps integer code to standardized label (e.g., 3 -> 'Bachelor's degree'). None if education_code is None. Ensures consistent labeling independent of education_typical string variations.

work_experience.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Work experience requirement label string. No transformation applied.

work_experience_code.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. BLS work experience code (1=5+ years, 2=Less than 5 years, 3=None). No transformation applied.

training_typical.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. Typical on-the-job training label string. No transformation applied.

training_code.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. BLS training code (1=Internship/residency through 6=None). No transformation applied.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'load_date' to 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze zone ingest date. No value transformation.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver transformation time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at.

source_url.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone. Contains the BLS download URL used during Bronze ingestion.

source_method.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone. Contains the fetch method identifier from Bronze ingestion.
